title: hieracium sylvaticum var. crassum
intro: Hieracium sylvaticum var. crassum, also known as a rough hawk's-beard, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the hawkweed plant, belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium sylvaticum var. crassum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in folk remedies for skin conditions and infections.
